results.Query: Add new_EK_PORT_66 to ju1.a1.m4. List direct child nodes of ju1.a1.m4 in the updated graph. Return a list of child nodes name.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-3, add-list
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    new_node_name = 'new_EK_PORT_66'
    graph_copy.add_node(new_node_name, name=new_node_name, type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a1.m4', new_node_name, type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    children_names = []
    for child in graph_copy.successors('ju1.a1.m4'):
        edge_data = graph_copy.get_edge_data('ju1.a1.m4', child)
        if edge_data['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS']:
            child_name = graph_copy.nodes[child]['name']
            children_names.append(child_name)
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {
        'type': 'list',
        'data': children_names,
        'updated_graph': graph_json
    }
    return return_object
